import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut total = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        total = total + n
        count = count + 1
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    Err("no integers")
  else
    let avg = total / count
    println("avg=#{avg}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
